mapper.insert: INSERT INTO maintenance_plan ( aircraft_id, maintenance_type, maintenance_reason, planned_start_time, planned_end_time, plan_status, created_by, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{aircraftId}, #{maintenanceType}, #{maintenanceReason}, #{plannedStartTime}, #{plannedEndTime}, #{planStatus}, #{createdBy}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select:
SELECT mp.plan_id AS planId, mp.aircraft_id AS aircraftId, a.registration_no AS registrationNo,
mp.maintenance_type AS maintenanceType, mp.maintenance_reason AS maintenanceReason, mp.planned_start_time AS plannedStartTime, mp.planned_end_time AS plannedEndTime, mp.plan_status AS planStatus
FROM maintenance_plan mp JOIN aircraft a ON mp.aircraft_id = a.aircraft_id
ORDER BY mp.planned_start_time DESC
